text.title: Workflow Design Phase Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable input signals to a conclusion that references a rule from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: Do ALL Applies-If conditions hold AND NO Skip-If condition triggers?

branch.question: Does the feature touch ≥3 components OR require ≥2 architectural trade-offs?

conclusion.verdict: apply the methodology; produce design.md and validate it.
skip the full design phase; author a single TASK directly.
defer; wait until spec is Accepted before starting design.
do not apply this methodology in this context; route to the correct one or skip.

text.example: Applies-If holds, Skip-If clear → spec.md is Accepted → feature touches 3+ components with real trade-offs → run the design phase, emit design.md, validate.
